name: Ray POP
description: The Ray POP casts a ray from each points of the input, in the direction defined by the Ray Attribute, and outputs new attributes that report what each ray hits. The second input is the set of triangles and quads that the rays are tested against. The Ray POP can count the number of primitives it hit as it transmits through all primitive in its line, and the distance to the closest primitive. It can output properties of the primitive it hit - its primitive index, the barymetric position on the primitive it hit, and the values of any attributes on the primitive it hit. It can also output information about rays that are reflected. Assuming the Collision Geometry is a closed surface, the Ray POP can report whether it is located inside or outside the volume. It can be put into a mode where it outputs line strips representing the rays that it casts, intersects and reflects. By default, the Ray POP projects the points on the collision mesh, Scale is a 0 to 1 multiplier between original position and projected position, Lift is also a control to move the point along the ray but in absolute units (to move points inside or outside a bit from the collision surface. It can leverage [[Hardware Ray Tracing]]. See also [[Math Mix POP]] (has ray functions)

parameters.name: Ray Attribute
parameters.label: Ray Attribute
parameters.description: Ray direction attribute.

parameters.name: Negate Ray
parameters.label: Negate Ray
parameters.description: Negates the direction of the ray.

parameters.name: Number of Bounces
parameters.label: Number of Bounces
parameters.description: The number of bounces for the rays.

parameters.name: Connect Points
parameters.label: Connect Points
parameters.description: When doing multiple bounces, for each input point whether to connect the intersections as a line strip.

parameters.name: Limit Ray Length
parameters.label: Limit Ray Length
parameters.description: The ray length will be limited.

parameters.name: Trim Ray
parameters.label: Trim Ray
parameters.description: Option to trim ray line strip.

parameters.name: Hardware Ray Tracing
parameters.label: Hardware Ray Tracing
parameters.description: Selects mode for Hardware Ray Tracing if supported

parameters.name: Opaque Geometry
parameters.label: Opaque Geometry
parameters.description: When using hardware raytracing, specify whether the collision geometry is treated as opaque (only the closest or the first hit is returned) or not.

parameters.name: Any Hit
parameters.label: Any Hit
parameters.description: Whether to return the first hit, not guaranteed to be the closest or the farthest one.

parameters.name: Hit Normal
parameters.label: Hit Normal
parameters.description: Generate normal attribute at hit locations.

parameters.name: Reflected Ray
parameters.label: Reflected Ray
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute containing the reflected ray direction.

parameters.name: Point Intersection Distance
parameters.label: Point Intersection Distance
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the distance between the original point and the intersection with the collision geometry.

parameters.name: Farthest Hit
parameters.label: Farthest Hit
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the farthest hit position.

parameters.name: Number of Hits
parameters.label: Number of Hits
parameters.description: The Number of hits for rays passing through all the primitives in the ray direction.

parameters.name: Inside
parameters.label: Inside
parameters.description: Outputs an attribute containing 0 for rays stating outside a volume (a closed polygon surface), or 1 for rays originating inside a volume.

parameters.name: Hit Primitive Index
parameters.label: Hit Primitive Index
parameters.description: Generate primitive index at hit locations.

parameters.name: Barycentric Coordinates
parameters.label: Barycentric Coordinates
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the barycentric coordinates of the intersection point.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: Intersection scaling factor.

parameters.name: Lift
parameters.label: Lift
parameters.description: This value offsets the point from the collision geometry in the direction of its normal.

parameters.name: Hit Point Attr Scope
parameters.label: Hit Point Attr Scope
parameters.description: Point attributes to sample on the collision geometry.

parameters.name: Hit Primitive Attr Scope
parameters.label: Hit Primitive Attr Scope
parameters.description: Primitive attributes to sample on the collision geometry.

parameters.name: Hit Vertex Attr Scope
parameters.label: Hit Vertex Attr Scope
parameters.description: Vertex attributes to sample on the collision geometry.
